description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir:latest Docker image with a global before_script that runs make init and a variable MIX_ENV set to test. Define three stages: setup, build, and test. In the setup stage add a get-dependencies job that runs make deps and stores the deps directory and mix.lock as artifacts that expire in 30 minutes. In the build stage add a compile job that depends on get-dependencies, runs make compile, and archives the _build directory as an artifact that expires in 30 minutes. In the test stage add a lint job that depends on get-dependencies and compile and runs make lint, and a tests job that also depends on get-dependencies and compile, runs make test then mix coveralls.json, and captures test coverage using the regex /\[TOTAL\]\s+(\d+\.\d+)%/.
